title: Dynamic composition with conditional joins and pinned values
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.Search.full_search/1` that takes a params map with up to 6 optional filters: `"title_like"`, `"published_after"` (DateTime), `"category_name"` (requires category join), `"author_email"` (requires author join), `"min_comments"` (requires left_join + group_by + having), `"tag_names"` (list — requires many_to_many join). Dynamically add the required joins AND the filters using a combination of `Enum.reduce` + `dynamic/2`. All joins must be added conditionally so simple queries don't pay the cost. Write to `lib/my_app/blog/search.ex`.
tier_rationale: Six filters, four join types, conditional application, proper pin and dynamic usage. The most demanding dynamic-query scenario.
